title: PHP file missing license header comment
description: A module PHP file does not contain a license header reference in the first few lines. This is a documentation best practice, not a security issue.
explanation: Every PHP file in a CMSMS module should include a license header comment near the top referencing the doc/LICENSE file. This ensures legal clarity for anyone reading or reusing the code. The standard header is: #-- See LICENSE for full license information. --#
fix:
Add the license header after the opening <?php tag:
<?php
#--------------------------------------------------
# See LICENSE for full license information.
#--------------------------------------------------
